summary: Created the durable plugin-first initiative and scaffolded the repo-local plugin, marketplace entry, and end-user skill.
Validated the public skill and plugin with the official creator validators.
Added and passed static contracts for plugin identity, marketplace wiring, CLI prerequisites, safe discovery, workflow selection, cleanup, and error handling.
Repositioned the product, architecture, agent manifest, development guidance, and changelog around the plugin-first entry point.
Passed generated schema checks, full no-resource validation, plugin-aware release readiness, and exec-plan validation.
